quotes.text: 你以为你毕业能进银行当行长？你只能去银行卖理财产品。
quotes.text_en: You think you'll become a bank president after graduation? You'll just be selling financial products at a bank.
quotes.context: 揭示金融专业毕业生的真实就业情况

quotes.text: 什么是好工作？钱多、事少、离家近、稳定。但你最多只能占两个。
quotes.text_en: What's a good job? Good pay, light work, close to home, stable. But you can only have two at most.
quotes.context: 理性分析好工作的标准

quotes.text: 考公考编，是当代年轻人最大的确定性。别嫌弃体制内，等你35岁被裁员就知道了。
quotes.text_en: Civil service exams are the greatest certainty for today's youth. Don't dismiss government jobs — you'll understand when you get laid off at 35.
quotes.context: 鼓励考公务员和事业编制

quotes.text: 你学了四年管理学，毕业去管谁？人家凭什么让你管？
quotes.text_en: You studied management for four years — who are you going to manage after graduation? Why would anyone let you manage them?
quotes.context: 批评管理学专业本科毕业生的就业尴尬

quotes.text: 互联网行业的高薪是用青春换的。你能拼到35岁，然后呢？
quotes.text_en: The high salaries in tech are traded for your youth. You can push yourself until 35, then what?
quotes.context: 分析互联网行业的年龄危机

quotes.text: 学技术的永远不会失业，因为社会永远需要能干活的人。
quotes.text_en: Those who learn practical skills will never be unemployed, because society always needs people who can do the work.
quotes.context: 强调技术类专业的就业保障
